Yi-Da Tsai — Visual Designer & Frontend Developer based in Taipei

TitleFoucault — A Study in Knowledge & Order
Year2024
Category
EditorialBookPoster
Tag
PhilosophyMichel Foucault
YIYIDADATSAITSAI

Yi-Da Tsai｜蔡易達Multidisciplinary designer based in Taipei. Focused on visual design and digital experience.

Through structure and systems, transforming concepts into perceptible design.

Design Approach

Design is shaped through the interplay
of typography, structure, and material.

By balancing aesthetics and logic,
making each work more precise and meaningful.

NarrativeFormEditorialFlow

(003)

Visual Language(001)
Material Expression(002)
Narrative Form(003)
1
Concept
Every project starts with a clear concept. It defines the direction, intention, and narrative of the work.
2
Structure
Structure builds the visual foundation. It organizes elements into a coherent and functional system.
3
Material
Material introduces texture and depth. Through surface, light, and tactility, the work gains physical presence.
4
Detail
Detail refines the final expression. Precision in small elements reveals the level of craftsmanship.

BETWEENBETWEENART & SYSTEMART & SYSTEM

Where aesthetics, logic, and experience intersect

Logic

Clarity begins with structure.

Systems and hierarchy
create order from complexity.

Experience

Design is shaped through experience.

Atmosphere and memory
define how it is perceived.

Aesthetics

Form gives emotion its surface.

Rhythm and visual tone
reveal meaning in form.

Construct

Emotion is carefully constructed.

Shaped through structure
brought to life by design.
